query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia

response.objective_caption: A person sits in the right foreground of a vehicle interior, facing a rain-speckled window that looks out onto a wet urban street. Multiple cars drive along the road, which is lined with trees and streetlights. Overcast skies fill the upper portion of the frame, with a bird visible in flight near the upper left. Dark triangular shapes hang from the top edge of the window frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person sits in the right foreground of a vehicle interior in a casual snapshot composition, their face partially cropped by the right edge of the frame. The image has a muted, desaturated palette of grays and subdued blues, looking out through a rain-speckled window onto a wet urban street. Multiple cars drive along the road, which is lined with trees and streetlights. Overcast skies fill the upper portion of the frame, with a bird visible in flight near the upper left and dark triangular shapes hanging from the top edge of the window frame.
